title: Dhammapada, Chapter 18: Impurity
description: Chapter 18 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 18 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: You are now like a dried-up leaf. The messengers of death await you. You stand at the threshold of departure, yet you have no provision for the journey.
